title: Fix profile display names and avatars to fully persist across sessions (frontend)

requirements.summary: Update frontend profile hooks and ProfileEditorDialog to correctly read and write display name and avatar, ensuring UI reflects persisted values immediately after login and after saving
acceptanceCriteria: After saving a display name or avatar in ProfileEditorDialog, the new values are immediately visible in the sidebar and message feed without a hard refresh.
On login, the profile data fetched from the backend populates the display name and avatar in the UI.
MessageFeed shows sender avatars correctly for users who have set a profile picture.

file_operations.description: Ensure the useGetCallerUserProfile and useSaveCallerUserProfile hooks correctly handle profilePicture as Uint8Array from the backend interface. Update the query to properly fetch and cache both displayName and profilePicture fields. Ensure mutations invalidate the ['currentUserProfile'] query key to trigger immediate UI refresh.

Update ProfileEditorDialog to correctly handle profilePicture as Uint8Array when reading from and writing to the backend. Ensure file input converts uploaded images to Uint8Array before saving. Add loading states during profile fetch and save operations. Verify that saved profile data immediately reflects in the UI by ensuring proper query invalidation.

Update MessageFeed to correctly render sender avatars from profilePicture Uint8Array data fetched via getUserProfile. Convert Uint8Array to a displayable image format (data URL or blob URL). Handle cases where profilePicture is undefined or null by showing a fallback avatar. Ensure avatar images are efficiently rendered for each message sender.

Update TeamSidebar to display the authenticated user's displayName and avatar from the cached profile data. Ensure the sidebar reflects updated profile information immediately after the user saves changes in ProfileEditorDialog. Use the useGetCallerUserProfile hook to fetch the current user's profile and display it in the sidebar header.

Ensure UserProfileSetup correctly initializes the user profile with both displayName and an optional profilePicture field. Update the form to allow users to optionally upload a profile picture during initial setup. Convert uploaded image to Uint8Array before calling saveCallerUserProfile. Ensure the setup modal only appears when the user has no existing profile.
